sys_ui_message.key: Tasker - Active Tasks cannot exist under Draft Tasks. Navigate to the Earliest Task-Order Draft Task to publish this Draft Task.
sys_ui_message.message: Active Tasks cannot exist under Draft Tasks. Navigate to the Earliest Task-Order Draft Task to publish this Draft Task..
